title: asplenium striatum var. expansum
intro: Asplenium striatum var. expansum, also known as the fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the Aspleniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Asplenium striatum var. expansum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing its fronds in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
